steps.title: Identify the discovery signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that genetic research “only recently” determined something about maize's wild ancestor. The signal is that research has made a discovery—revealing what was previously unknown.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: ”Revealed” means to uncover or make known—exactly what genetic research did when it determined that teosinte grass is maize's ancestor. The other choices either misfit the meaning (“expanded” doesn't convey uncovering) or are illogical in context (“encouraged” and “petitioned” don't apply to identifying an ancestor). That matches choice B — B is correct.
